title: Add AuraForge to build
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [AuraForge](https://autoforge-iota.vercel.app/) to build
- AuraForge is an Identity Orchestration Studio that generates strict, flat 2D vector mascots for AI agents, team members, or digital personas, acting as a profiling tool for visual identities.

Fixes #10238

gist.headline: Forging new identities
gist.blurb: AuraForge just sprouted in the greenhouse. It's a neat little studio for generating flat 2D vector mascots for your AI agents, because even bots need a good headshot.
gist.summary: Added AuraForge, an identity orchestration studio for generating flat 2D vector mascots, to the community apps showcase.
gist.impact: Creators can now use AuraForge to quickly spin up consistent visual identities and avatars for their digital personas.
gist.visual_concept: A hybrid art studio and blacksmith forge. Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot crafting 2D character portraits. Represents the 'forge' aspect and the 'mascot/identity' aspect.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny blacksmith apron, working alongside a chunky monitor robot in a magical digital forge. They are crafting glowing 2D character portraits on a pixelated anvil. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny blacksmith apron, working alongside a chunky monitor robot in a magical digital forge. They are crafting glowing 2D character portraits on a pixelated anvil. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background.
